---
title: "Final Exam"
author: "Steven Todd McIntyre II"
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true

---
Dependencies
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(purrr)
library(httr)
library()
```

# (1) API calls to chess.com (10 points)

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```
